category_sources: source_facts.description says implementation of Remote Desktop Protocol; official FreeRDP GitHub README says FreeRDP is a free implementation of RDP with library and clients.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository use FreeRDP; source_facts.name is freerdp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README lists the project wiki, API documentation, FAQ, and compilation documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/FreeRDP/FreeRDP, so repo enrichment was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README/topics describe RDP implementation, clients, library, X11, Wayland, SDL, and remote desktop functionality.
